notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Lenyn Sosa reaches on a fielding error by third baseman Junior Caminero.

notableEvents.label: Wild pitch run(s)
notableEvents.detail: Wild pitch by pitcher Tommy Nance. Taylor Walls scores.

notableEvents.label: Richie Palacios pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Richie Palacios flies out to left fielder Yohendrick Piñango. Cedric Mullins to 3rd.

notableEvents.detail: Lenyn Sosa reaches on a fielding error by third baseman Junior Caminero.

notableEvents.label: Yohendrick Piñango pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Yohendrick Piñango strikes out on a foul tip.

notableEvents.label: Jesús Sánchez pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Jesús Sánchez doubles (5) on a line drive to left fielder Ryan Vilade. Ernie Clement scores.

notableEvents.label: Yohendrick Piñango pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Yohendrick Piñango doubles (2) on a sharp line drive to right fielder Jonny DeLuca. Brandon Valenzuela scores. George Springer scores.
